title: lithocarpus sogerensis
intro: Lithocarpus sogerensis, also known as the Sogeri Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus sogerensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus sogerensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, syrups, and other remedies.
